title: Agent Event Loop
content: Agent prototype should read user messages, retrieve external context, call the LLM, optionally execute tools, and write final answers back.

title: ReAct Prompting
content: ReAct combines reasoning traces with actions. The agent thinks, selects a tool, observes tool output, and then writes a final answer.

title: Threaded Agent Design
content: A simple prototype can use one user thread for CLI IO and one agent thread for the autonomous event loop, communicating via queues.
